tasks.label: Kill process on 8080
args: $ErrorActionPreference=[System.Management.Automation.ActionPreference]::SilentlyContinue; try { $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 | Select-Object -First 1; if ($null -ne $conn -and $conn.OwningProcess) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } catch { }; exit 0
